inputs.label: Room Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the room to be floored. Standard architectural measurement per ISO 9001.

inputs.label: Room Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the room. Used to calculate area.

inputs.label: Flooring Unit Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost per square meter of flooring material. Market price based on supplier quotes.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material waste due to cutting and fitting. Industry standard 5-15% per Lean construction practices.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage for flooring installers. Based on local labor rates.

inputs.label: Installation Time per m²
inputs.businessContext: Time required to install one square meter of flooring. Industry benchmark from RSMeans.

inputs.label: Additional Costs
inputs.businessContext: Miscellaneous costs like adhesive, underlayment, or disposal fees.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment per Six Sigma DMAIC.

thresholds.wasteFactor > 15: High waste factor may indicate poor planning or irregular room shape.
thresholds.laborCostPerHour > 100: Labor cost exceeds typical range; verify market rates.
thresholds.installationTimePerSqm > 1: Installation time is high; consider efficiency improvements.

suggestedActions: wasteFactor > 15 ? 'Optimize cutting layout to reduce waste.' : ''
laborCostPerHour > 100 ? 'Negotiate labor rates or consider alternative installers.' : ''
installationTimePerSqm > 1 ? 'Train installers or use faster installation methods.' : ''
